signatures: modify(primitiveId: string | IPCB_PrimitivePour, property: {         net?: string;         layer?: TPCB_LayersOfCopper;         complexPolygon?: IPCB_Polygon;         pourFillMethod?: EPCB_PrimitivePourFillMethod;         preserveSilos?: boolean;         pourName?: string;         pourPriority?: number;         lineWidth?: number;         primitiveLock?: boolean;     }): Promise<IPCB_PrimitivePour | undefined>
classSummary: PCB & 封装 / 覆铜边框图元类
returnSummary:
Promise<[IPCB\_PrimitivePour](./IPCB_PrimitivePour.md) \| undefined>

覆铜边框图元对象，`undefined` 表示修改失败

params.name: property
params.type: { net?: string; layer?: TPCB\_LayersOfCopper ; complexPolygon?: IPCB\_Polygon ; pourFillMethod?: EPCB\_PrimitivePourFillMethod ; preserveSilos?: boolean; pourName?: string; pourPriority?: number; lineWidth?: number; primitiveLock?: boolean; }

exampleNotes: 修改案例会先创建一个临时图元，再构造一个最小但真实的 property 对象执行 modify，最后自动清理。
